body.--accent-1: oklch(from var(--base-accent) l c calc(h + var(--rotation-1)))
body.--accent-2: oklch(from var(--base-accent) l c calc(h + var(--rotation-2)))
body.--box-shadow:
inset -2px -2px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 0% c h),
    inset 2px 2px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 50% c h)
body.--box-shadow-active:
inset 2px 2px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 0% c h),
    inset -2px -2px oklch(from var(--base-accent) 50% c h)
body.--box-shadow-active-sm:
inset 1px 1px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 0% c h),
    inset -1px -1px oklch(from var(--base-accent) 50% c h)
body.--box-shadow-sm:
inset -1px -1px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 0% c h),
    inset 1px 1px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 50% c h)
body.background: oklch(0.22 0.0651659 297.489) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.--accent-1: oklch(from var(--base-accent) l c calc(h + var(--rotation-1)))
body.styled-scrollbars.--accent-2: oklch(from var(--base-accent) l c calc(h + var(--rotation-2)))
body.styled-scrollbars.--box-shadow:
inset -2px -2px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 0% c h),
    inset 2px 2px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 50% c h)
body.styled-scrollbars.--box-shadow-active:
inset 2px 2px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 0% c h),
    inset -2px -2px oklch(from var(--base-accent) 50% c h)
body.styled-scrollbars.--box-shadow-active-sm:
inset 1px 1px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 0% c h),
    inset -1px -1px oklch(from var(--base-accent) 50% c h)
body.styled-scrollbars.--box-shadow-sm:
inset -1px -1px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 0% c h),
    inset 1px 1px oklch(from var(--background-secondary) 50% c h)
body.styled-scrollbars.background: oklch(0.22 0.0651659 297.489) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
